scripts.test: dotnet tool restore && dotnet fable tests/Tests.fsproj -o tests/out && npx mocha --require global-jsdom/register tests/out/Main.js
scripts.test:rn: dotnet tool restore && dotnet fable reactnative.tests/Tests.fsproj -o reactnative.tests/out && npm run lint:rn && npx mocha --require ./reactnative.tests/stubs/register.mjs reactnative.tests/out/Main.js
